## [00:00 - 03:02]

Hi, this is Don Crowther. Let's talk about another amazing way to make money from webinars that most people never even think about. Here it is. One of the problems of webinars is that most people don't want to hear the same message over and over again. So how do you solve that? You solve it through what we call different hook, same offer webinars. And here's how they work. You simply change out the content portion of the webinar to resolve a different but related need. And then you change up your webinar marketing, all the other marketing in that funnel to focus on that new need. And you simply market to the exact same audience that you worked with before. All right. And so you've done that and that sold X dollars. And you've done it a number of times. You're taking a bunch of people through the funnel.
